spacing.filled_text: Spacing - In primary circuits, 1.5 mm minimum spacing are maintained through air and over surfaces of insulating material between current-carrying parts of opposite polarity and 1.5 mm minimum between such current-carrying parts and dead-metal parts or low voltage isolated circuits. Refer to Illustration __ for areas to verify.

access.filled_text: Accessibility of Live Parts - All uninsulated live parts in primary circuitry are housed within a metal enclosure constructed with no openings other than those specifically described in Sections 4 and 5.

text_support.text:
Risk # Sub-System Risk Description Severity Probablility Pre-Mitigation PRN Mitigation Post-Mitigation Probabliity Post-Mitigation PRN Verfication Reference Risk Acceptable ? Y/N
Svc-1 System Shock Shock from touching live part of system with covers removed Catastrophic Likely 3 Service manual warnings, service personnel are trained, and connections are covered. Rare 2 training documentation/ 61010 report
Svc-2 System Pinch hazard while performing maintenance While servicing the internal system, unit activates Severe Possible 2 Service manual warnings, service personnel are trained, interlocks must be over-ridden (personnel are trained to use EMO stop for panel interlock override) and use temporary covers while moving gantry.  Firmware has a position error timeout that will remove power to gantry in the event of a blockage.(under force limit for 61010). Rare 2 training documentation

polarized.filled_text: Polarized Connection - This product is provided with a polarized power supply connection. All single pole switches and fuses are connected only to the ungrounded supply circuit conductor. The block diagram shows the fuse is placed in the line (L) conductor before entering the power supply, ensuring polarity is maintained.

internal_wiring.filled_text: Internal Wiring - Internal wiring is routed away from sharp or moving parts. Internal wiring leads terminating in soldered connections are made mechanically secure prior to soldering. Recognized Component separable connectors are acceptable. Wiring passing through metal walls is protected by bushings or grommets. All wiring is minimum ++ AWG, with a minimum rating of ++V, ++°C.

markings.filled_text:
Markings - The product is marked as follows: The product is expected to be marked with the applicant's name, brand name, model number, date of manufacture, electrical ratings (including voltage and current), relevant safety symbols, and warnings. Markings should be legible, free from blurs and scratches, and include RoHS compliance information. Adhesive-backed labels are used, with black graphics on a white background, and referenced artwork is required to match the image. Certificates of RoHS compliance must accompany delivery.

The following markings in French are required:
